metadata.description: Marketplace for the JetLinks team. Hosts plugins that bridge Cowork (spec / prototype) and Claude Code (implementation).

plugins.name: jetlinks-spec
plugins.description: Spec-first workflow split into four boundary-clean skills: spec-workflow (contract knowledge), spec-scaffold (Cowork: research + spec interview + handoff), spec-prototype (CLI: frontend-only mock branch), spec-verify (Cowork: Phase 4 back-fill reconciliation).
